HomePage.heroDesc: Test your app in 16 days with packs of 18 developers, meet Google Play requirements, and go live. Start free.
HomePage.heroPremiumCTA: PUBLISH WITHOUT THE HASSLE: $10 USDT PREMIUM
HomePage.heroCommunityText: Join 5,000+ developers and go live on Google Play
HomePage.howItWorksDesc: Meet Google Play requirements in 4 steps.
HomePage.step1Desc: Join a pack of 18 developers. You'll be auto-assigned a pack upon signup.
HomePage.step2Desc: Enter your Google Play test link and instructions. Everyone in the pack starts testing your app.
HomePage.step3Desc: Test other apps in the pack daily. Missing tests gets you removed from the pack.
HomePage.step4Desc: 18 real testers, 16+ days of activity. You've met Google Play requirements. Ready to publish!
HomePage.featuresDesc: The easiest way to meet Google Play closed testing requirements.
HomePage.feature1Desc: More than Google's 12-tester requirement. Every tester is a real developer.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Exceeds Google Play's 14-day requirement. +2 days guarantee.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Pack members open and screenshot your app daily. Real usage, not passive installs.
HomePage.feature4Desc: Every tester leaves comments and reports bugs. Improve your app.
HomePage.feature5Desc: Missed tests = removal + 1 month pack ban. Everyone stays committed.
HomePage.pricingDesc: Choose the plan that fits your budget and timeline.
HomePage.faq1a: A pack is a testing group of 18 developers that works in 4 stages: Formation (18 members gather) → Upload (24 hours, setup proof required) → Test (16 days, daily screenshots) → Completion. Google requires 12 testers for 14 days — we offer 18 testers for 16 days with guaranteed service.
HomePage.faq2a: New accounts must be tested by 12 real users for 14 consecutive days before publishing.
HomePage.faq3q: How many people are in a pack?
HomePage.faq3a: Each pack consists of 18 developers. You test each other's apps for 16 days to meet Google Play requirements. Even if one person misses tests, you still have 17 testers — more than Google's 12.
HomePage.faq4a: They get removed from the pack and can't join a new pack for 1 month. This ensures everyone stays active.
HomePage.faq5q: What's the difference between free and paid testing?
HomePage.faq5a: In the free pack, 18 developers test each other and you may need to wait for a spot. With professional testing ($10 USDT), you're added as a premium member, get tested for 16 days, and have an unconditional refund guarantee if Google Play rejects your app.
HomePage.faq6q: When does testing start after payment?
HomePage.faq6a: With professional testing, you're added to the pack as a premium member immediately after payment confirmation. With the free pack, testing starts automatically when 18 members fill up (24 hours upload phase, then 16 days of testing).
HomePage.faq7q: What if testers uninstall my app?
HomePage.faq7a: According to Google policy, even if a tester uninstalls your app after installing it, they still count as 'testing' for 14 days. So there's nothing to worry about.
HomePage.faq8q: Do I need separate testing for each app?
HomePage.faq8a: Yes, each new app you want to publish on Google Play requires a separate closed testing process. Testing one app does not cover others.
HomePage.faq9q: How much does the paid service cost?
HomePage.faq9a: Professional testing costs $10 USDT (TRC-20). 18 pack members test your app, plus an unconditional refund guarantee if Google Play rejects.
HomePage.faq10q: Can my app be tested in any language?
HomePage.faq10a: Yes. Apps in all languages are supported. Feedback is provided in Turkish or English.
HomePage.faq11q: I have an organization account, do I need this?
HomePage.faq11a: Google Play's 12 tester / 14 day requirement applies to individual accounts created after November 2023. Organization accounts are not subject to this requirement.
HomePage.ctaTitle: Ready to Publish on Google Play?
HomePage.ctaDesc: Try the system used by 5,000+ developers. Start free.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.description: PremiumPeek is a testing community built to help developers meet the Google Play closed testing requirement for publishing apps.
AboutPage.featureCommunityDesc: Thousands of developers testing each other's apps.
AboutPage.featureReliableDesc: Removal for inactivity ensures everyone stays active.
AboutPage.featureFreeDesc: The core pack system is completely free.
AboutPage.featureGlobalDesc: Apps in all languages are supported.
AboutPage.missionDesc: To make the testing process easy, free, and accessible so every developer can publish their app on Google Play.
AboutPage.step1Desc: Create a free account and start joining packs.
AboutPage.step2Desc: Join packs created by other developers or create your own.
AboutPage.step3Desc: Test 2-3 apps every day and complete the testing process.
AboutPage.step4Desc: Meet the testing requirement and publish your app on Google Play.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: Questions? Get in touch.

ContactPage.faq1q: How quickly will I get a response?
ContactPage.faq1a: We usually respond within 1-2 hours. It may take a bit longer on weekends.
ContactPage.faq2q: What kind of help can I get?
ContactPage.faq2a: You can reach us about the pack system, testing process, payments, and technical issues.
ContactPage.faq3q: I'd like to send a collaboration proposal.
ContactPage.faq3a: You can send collaboration and partnership proposals through the same address.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.section1Desc: The data we collect is used only for the following purposes:
PrivacyPage.list1Item5: Email notifications (daily reminders, pack invitations, alerts)
PrivacyPage.section2Desc: Your user data is not shared with third parties. The following are exceptions:
PrivacyPage.list2Item3Desc: Only your wallet address is shared for payment processing. Private keys are not stored.
PrivacyPage.list2Item4Desc: When required by law or authorized authorities.
PrivacyPage.section3Desc: Our platform only uses essential technical cookies: session management and theme preference (dark/light). Third-party tracking cookies are not used. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.
PrivacyPage.section4Desc: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all your data is permanently deleted within 30 days. For account deletion requests, email premiumpeektest@gmail.com.
PrivacyPage.section5Desc: Under KVKK Law No. 6698, you have the following rights:
PrivacyPage.list5Item2: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
PrivacyPage.list5Item3: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
PrivacyPage.list5Item4: Object to the processing of your data
PrivacyPage.section6Desc: For questions about our privacy policy:
PrivacyPage.metaDescription: PremiumPeek privacy policy. Learn how your personal data is collected, used, and protected.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.section1Desc1: By creating an account, you agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information. You are solely responsible for the security of your account and the confidentiality of your password. All transactions occurring under your account are your responsibility.
TermsPage.section1Desc2: Creating multiple accounts, using false information, or registering with someone else's information is prohibited. In such cases, your account may be permanently suspended.
TermsPage.list2Item1: Pack members commit to testing other members' apps every day for 16 days.
TermsPage.list2Item2: Members who miss tests are automatically removed from the pack.
TermsPage.list2Item3: The removed member's app is removed from the pack; other members continue from where they left off.
TermsPage.list2Item4: The pack starts automatically when it reaches 18 members.
TermsPage.list2Item5: A member who leaves the pack has their app removed from the pack.
TermsPage.list2Item6: Each member can only be in one pack at a time.
TermsPage.list3Item1: Each pack consists of a maximum of 18 members.
TermsPage.list3Item2: Users who do not comply with pack rules may be removed from the pack.
TermsPage.list3Item3: Pack management and the testing process are carried out within the framework of rules determined by the platform.
TermsPage.list3Item4: If abuse (bots, fake accounts, cheating) is detected, the account is permanently suspended.
TermsPage.list3Item5: Platform management reserves the right to make pack adjustments when deemed necessary.
TermsPage.section4Title: 4. Crypto Payment and Fast Track Service
TermsPage.list4Item1: The Fast Track service covers premium membership in a pack and a 16-day testing process for $10 USDT (TRC-20).
TermsPage.list4Item2: Payment is made to the specified USDT wallet address. The TX Hash is provided by the user.
TermsPage.list4Item3: Testers are assigned within 6 hours after payment confirmation. The testing process lasts 16 days.
TermsPage.list4Item4: TX Hash verification is done by the admin. Invalid/incorrect TX Hash may result in order cancellation.
TermsPage.list4Item5: USDT refunds are sent back to the same wallet. Transaction fees are borne by the user.
TermsPage.list4Item6: If your Google Play production access application is rejected, your $10 USDT will be refunded.
TermsPage.list5Item1: It is mandatory to treat other users with respect and professionalism.
TermsPage.list5Item2: Insults, threats, harassment, or discriminatory behavior is strictly prohibited.
TermsPage.list5Item3: Spam, advertising, or unauthorized promotion is not allowed on the platform.
TermsPage.list5Item4: Apps containing prohibited content (drugs, weapons, gambling, adult content) are not accepted.
TermsPage.list5Item5: Users who violate rules are permanently removed without warning.
TermsPage.section6Desc: All rights to the applications and content you upload to the platform belong to you. PremiumPeek has the right to access this content to the extent necessary to carry out the testing process. Your applications are not shared with third parties; only your pack members can access them for testing purposes.
TermsPage.section7Desc: PremiumPeek helps you meet Google Play publishing requirements but does not guarantee publication approval. Google Play's publishing policies may change; the platform cannot be held responsible for situations arising from these changes. You acknowledge that the platform may experience service interruptions due to unexpected technical issues, maintenance, or force majeure.
TermsPage.section8Desc: These terms of service may be changed without prior notice. Important changes will be notified via email. You can always access the current version of the terms on this page.
TermsPage.metaDescription: PremiumPeek terms of service. The terms and conditions you agree to when using our platform.

RefundPage.title: Refund Guarantee
RefundPage.guaranteeBox: If your Google Play production access application is rejected, we unconditionally refund your $10 USDT.
RefundPage.condition1: Valid for all users who purchase the Fast Track service.
RefundPage.condition2: Must be requested within 30 days after the Google Play production access application is rejected.
RefundPage.condition3: The rejection reason must be related to the testing process (technical package errors are excluded).
RefundPage.condition4: The refund is sent back to the same USDT wallet address. Network fees may be deducted from the refund amount.
RefundPage.condition5: Each user can benefit from the refund right once per app.
RefundPage.step1Desc: Receive the rejection notice from Google Play Console.
RefundPage.step2Desc: Send an email to premiumpeektest@gmail.com with the rejection screenshot and your order information.
RefundPage.step3Desc: Our team reviews your request within 24 hours. Your USDT refund is sent to your wallet within 1-3 business days.
RefundPage.importantDesc: With our high success rate, refunds are almost never requested.
RefundPage.metaDescription: PremiumPeek refund guarantee. Unconditional refund if Google Play rejects.

AppRejectedPage.title: Rejected by Google Play?
AppRejectedPage.subtitle: Don't worry, most developers don't pass on the first try. Complete the testing process with PremiumPeek and reapply.
AppRejectedPage.reason4: Incomplete or incorrect application form responses
AppRejectedPage.card1Desc: More than Google's 12-tester requirement. Guaranteed participation.
AppRejectedPage.card2Desc: Exceeds the 14-day requirement with a +2 day buffer.
AppRejectedPage.card3Desc: Testers open your app every day.
AppRejectedPage.guaranteeNote: Unconditional refund guarantee if Google Play rejects
AppRejectedPage.metaDescription: Rejected by Google Play? Complete the testing process with PremiumPeek and reapply.

SampleReportPage.title: Sample Test Report
SampleReportPage.subtitle: A sample of the report you receive with our professional testing service.
SampleReportPage.row1Desc: Black screen appears when the app is launched, resolves after 3 seconds.
SampleReportPage.row2Desc: Buttons on the registration screen overlap in mobile view.
SampleReportPage.row3Desc: A dark mode toggle could be added to the profile page.
SampleReportPage.row4Desc: App crashes when notifications are clicked (Android 14).
SampleReportPage.row5Desc: Font size on the homepage is too small, hard to read.
SampleReportPage.formProcess: Testing process: 18 testers, 16 days, daily active participation
SampleReportPage.formFeedback: Feedback: 5 bug reports, 3 UI/UX improvements, 2 suggestions
SampleReportPage.formComments: Tester comments: Positive feedback, app successfully tested
SampleReportPage.formResult: Result: Google Play publishing requirements fully met
SampleReportPage.metaDescription: PremiumPeek professional testing service sample report. See what a test report looks like.
